title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on the street in concrete jungle】

jazz funk.rare groove.acid jazz

This time, we're sharing a transition scene from "Homesick – The Last Poets" into "Jungle Groove – The Jungle Band".

Please enjoy the groove unique to analog, which is a combination of songs by top musicians who play precise rhythms.

今回は「HOMESICK - THE LAST POETS」から「Jungle Groove · The Jungle Band」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
正確なリズムを刻む最高峰のミュージシャンの楽曲を掛け合わせたアナログならではのグルーヴをお楽しみください。

Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GQq7p8pyv2E
